title: 13in Mermaid Toy Set Plush Princess Pink Mermaid Doll with Kids Dress Up Jewelry Set Pretend Play Accessories Birthday Gifts Toy for Toddler Girl

High-Quality Materials: Our mermaid plush toys are made of high-quality pp cotton material, which is durable, skin-friendly and fluffy, with solid stitching, and the real thing is more perfect, which can bring unlimited fun to your children.
Amazing Dress Up Toys: If your child is interested in mermaids and pretend play, this toy will bring you endless surprises and is definitely worth the money.

Ideal Gift for Girls: If you want to prepare birthday or Easter, Children's Day, Christmas, New Year, Halloween gifts for your child, this mermaid set with excellent workmanship and exquisite accessories will be your ideal choice.
